content.query:
SELECT TOP (100) 
srs.LeadSubSource
,dsp.Disposition
,prd.ProductName
,[LeadID]
,[CustomerID]
,[EntryDate]
,[DateEntered]

,lds.[ProductID]
,lds.[DispositionID]
,lds.[LeadSourceID]
,[BranchID]
,[SalesDistrictID]
,[RankID]
,lds.[LeadSubSourceID]
,[AppointmentID]
,[SalesRep1_EmployeeID]
,[SalesRep2_EmployeeID]
,[CallBack_EmployeeID]
,[PromoterID]
,[LeadNumber]

,[ApptDate]
,[CallBackDate]
,[DateReceived]
,[FollowUpDate]
,[DeferDate]
,[ApptSet]
,[Verified]
,[Confirmed]
,[Issued]
,[NetIssued]
,[Sat]
,[Sold]
,[EverSet]
,[EverVerified]
,[EverIssued]
,[EverNetIssued]
,[EverSat]
,[EverConfirmed]
,[SetBy_EmployeeID]
,[VerifiedBy_EmployeeID]
,[ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID]
,[ApptDuration]
,[GrossSalesAmount]
,[SalesRepSplit]
,[LastCallDate]
,[LastCallResultID]
,[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank]
,[LeadScore_LogisticRegressionRank]
,[LeadScore_RegressionRank]
,[LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy]
,[LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount]
,[LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue]
,[LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy]
,[LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount]
,[LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue]
,[LP_LeadID]
,[LP_CustomerID]
,lds.[LP_ProductID]
,lds.[LP_DispositionID]
,lds.[LP_LeadSourceID]
,[LP_BranchID]
,[LP_SalesDistrictID]
,[LP_RankID]
,lds.[LP_LeadSubSourceID]
,[LP_AppointmentID]
,[LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID]
,[LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID]
,[LP_CallBack_EmployeeID]
,[LP_SetBy_EmployeeID]
,[LP_VerifiedBy_EmployeeID]
,[LP_ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID]
,[LP_PromoterID]
,[LP_LastCallResultID]
,lds.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
 ,[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
 where 
 lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
 and lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
 and lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
 and CustomerID IN
 (
'PBC-259158',
'PBC-177534',
'PBC-205537',
'PBC-255996',
'PBC-200528',
'PBC-182864',
'PBC-143130',
'PBC-195356',
'PBC-203037',
'PBC-183998'
 )
 order BY
 CustomerID, EntryDate
